title: Restaurant
description: 注文とおすすめを聞く

turns.partnerLine: Hi! Welcome. How many in your party?
turns.partnerLineJa: いらっしゃいませ。何名様ですか？
turns.hint: We're two. / Just one. / A table for three, please.

sampleFeedback.correction: そのままで伝わります。
sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: We're two. / A table for two, please.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: 人数を言うだけでもOK。「A table for 〜」は「〜名で席をお願いします」という丁寧な言い方です。

turns.partnerLine: Here's the menu. What would you like to drink?
turns.partnerLineJa: メニューです。お飲み物は何にされますか？
turns.hint: I'll have water. / Could I get a glass of wine?

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: I'll have water, please. / I'd like a glass of house red.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: I'll have 〜 / I'd like 〜 は注文でよく使います。please をつけると丁寧になります。

turns.partnerLine: And for the main course? Do you have any recommendations?
turns.partnerLineJa: メインは何にされますか？おすすめはありますか？
turns.hint: What do you recommend? / I'll have the fish. / What's popular?

sampleFeedback.correction: その言い方で大丈夫です。
sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: What do you recommend? / I'll go with the fish. / What's popular today?
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: recommend は「おすすめする」。What's popular? で「人気メニューは？」と聞けます。

turns.partnerLine: The grilled salmon is our most popular. Would you like to try that?
turns.partnerLineJa: 焼きサーモンが一番人気です。いかがですか？
turns.hint: Yes, I'll have that. / Sounds good. / Could I have that?

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Yes, I'll have that. / That sounds great, I'll take it.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: Sounds good. は「いいですね」のカジュアルな言い方。I'll take it. で「それにします」と決められます。

turns.partnerLine: Perfect. I'll bring that right out. Enjoy your meal!
turns.partnerLineJa: かしこまりました。すぐお持ちします。ごゆっくりどうぞ。
turns.hint: Thank you. / Thanks!

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Thank you! / Thanks, you too!
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: 短く Thank you. で十分。相手が Enjoy! と言ったら Thanks, you too! と返すと自然です。

turns.partnerLine: Good evening. Do you have a reservation?
turns.partnerLineJa: こんばんは。ご予約はおありですか？
turns.hint: Yes, I have a reservation under 〜. / Yes, the name is 〜.

sampleFeedback.correction: その言い方で問題ありません。
sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Yes, I have a reservation under Tanaka. / Yes, it's under the name of Tanaka.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: under 〜 で「〜の名前で（予約している）」という意味になります。

turns.partnerLine: I found it. May I see your passport, please?
turns.partnerLineJa: 予約を確認しました。パスポートを拝見できますか？
turns.hint: Here you go. / Sure. / Here it is.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Here you go. / Sure, here it is.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: 書類を渡すときの Here you go. はとてもよく使います。

turns.partnerLine: Thank you. Your room is on the 5th floor. Check-out is by 11 a.m. Is that okay?
turns.partnerLineJa: ありがとうございます。お部屋は5階です。チェックアウトは11時までです。よろしいですか？
turns.hint: Yes, that's fine. / No problem. / Okay, thank you.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Yes, that's fine. / No problem, thanks.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: that's fine / no problem で「大丈夫です」と承諾できます。

turns.partnerLine: Do you need help with your luggage?
turns.partnerLineJa: 荷物のお手伝いをしましょうか？
turns.hint: No, I'm fine. / Yes, please. / I can manage, thanks.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: No, I'm fine, thank you. / Yes, that would be great.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: I'm fine で「大丈夫です」、that would be great で「お願いします」と丁寧に言えます。

turns.partnerLine: Here's your key. Have a pleasant stay!
turns.partnerLineJa: こちらが鍵です。ご滞在を楽しんでください。
turns.hint: Thank you. / Thanks!

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Thank you! / Thanks, I will.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: 短く Thank you. で十分。Have a pleasant stay に対して Thanks, I will. と返すと自然です。

turns.partnerLine: Hi, I'm Alex. Nice to meet you!
turns.partnerLineJa: こんにちは、アレックスです。よろしく。
turns.hint: Nice to meet you too. I'm 〜. / Likewise!

sampleFeedback.correction: その返しで大丈夫です。
sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Nice to meet you too! I'm Yuki. / Likewise! I'm Yuki.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: Likewise は「こちらこそ」のように使える短い表現です。

turns.partnerLine: So, what do you do?
turns.partnerLineJa: お仕事は何をされているんですか？
turns.hint: I work at 〜. / I'm a 〜. / I'm in 〜.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: I work at a tech company. / I'm a teacher. / I'm in marketing.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: What do you do? は職業を聞く定番。I'm in 〜 で業界や分野を簡潔に言えます。

turns.partnerLine: That's interesting! Is this your first time here?
turns.partnerLineJa: おもしろいですね。ここは初めてですか？
turns.hint: Yes, it is. / No, I've been here before. / Yes, first time.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Yes, it's my first time. / No, I've been here a few times.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: Is this your first time? に対して Yes, it is. だけでOK。何度目か言うなら I've been here 〜 times. です。

turns.partnerLine: How do you like it so far?
turns.partnerLineJa: 今のところどうですか？
turns.hint: It's great. / I love it. / So far so good.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: It's great! / I'm really enjoying it. / So far so good!
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: So far so good は「今のところ順調です」の口語表現。よく使います。

turns.partnerLine: Well, it was nice talking to you. Maybe we can grab coffee sometime!
turns.partnerLineJa: 話せてよかったです。今度コーヒーでもどうですか。
turns.hint: That would be nice. / Sure, I'd like that. / Sounds good!

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: That would be nice! / Sure, I'd love to. Let's do that.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: grab coffee は「コーヒーを飲む」のカジュアルな言い方。I'd love to で「喜んで」と返せます。

turns.partnerLine: Is this your family in the photo?
turns.partnerLineJa: その写真、ご家族ですか？
turns.hint: Yes, this is my 〜. / Yes, that's my wife and kids.

sampleFeedback.correction: その言い方で大丈夫です。
sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Yes, this is my family. / Yes, that's my wife and two kids.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: this is 〜 で「こちらが〜です」と紹介できます。that's は写真を指して言うときによく使います。

turns.partnerLine: They look lovely! How old are your children?
turns.partnerLineJa: 素敵ですね。お子さんは何歳ですか？
turns.hint: My son is 〜 and my daughter is 〜. / They're 〜 and 〜.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: My son is seven and my daughter is four. / They're seven and four.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: 年齢は He's 〜 / She's 〜 や They're 〜 で言います。years old は省略することが多いです。

turns.partnerLine: Do they speak English?
turns.partnerLineJa: 英語は話せますか？
turns.hint: A little. / My son is learning. / Not really, but they're learning.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: A little. / They're still learning. / My son can speak a bit.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: A little だけで「少し」と答えられます。They're still learning で「まだ勉強中です」と伝えられます。

turns.partnerLine: And is your wife here with you on this trip?
turns.partnerLineJa: 今回の旅行は奥さんも一緒ですか？
turns.hint: Yes, she's here. / No, she's at home. / She's back in Japan.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Yes, she's here with me. / No, she's at home with the kids.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: with me / with the kids で誰とどこにいるかが伝わります。

turns.partnerLine: You have a beautiful family. Thanks for sharing!
turns.partnerLineJa: 素敵なご家族ですね。教えてくれてありがとう。
turns.hint: Thank you. / Thanks! / I'm glad you think so.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Thank you! / Thanks, I'm lucky. / I'm glad you think so.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: 褒められたら Thank you で受け止めます。I'm lucky で「恵まれている」と返せます。

turns.partnerLine: Congratulations! How do you know the couple?
turns.partnerLineJa: おめでとうございます。新郎新婦とはどういうお知り合いですか？
turns.hint: I'm a friend of 〜. / I work with 〜. / We went to school together.

sampleFeedback.correction: その言い方で問題ありません。
sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: I'm a friend of the bride. / I work with the groom. / We went to college together.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: the bride = 花嫁、the groom = 新郎。I'm a friend of 〜 で「〜の友達です」と伝えられます。

turns.partnerLine: The ceremony was beautiful, wasn't it?
turns.partnerLineJa: 式、素敵でしたね。
turns.hint: Yes, it was. / I thought so too. / Absolutely.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Yes, it was beautiful. / I thought so too! / Absolutely, I loved it.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: 〜, wasn't it? には Yes, it was. で同意します。I thought so too で「私もそう思いました」です。

turns.partnerLine: Have you tried the cake yet?
turns.partnerLineJa: ケーキはもう食べましたか？
turns.hint: Not yet. / Yes, it was delicious. / I'm about to.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Not yet, but I will! / Yes, it was delicious. / I'm about to get some.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: Not yet で「まだ」、I'm about to 〜 で「今から〜するところ」です。

turns.partnerLine: Would you like to join us for a photo?
turns.partnerLineJa: 一緒に写真を撮りませんか？
turns.hint: Sure! / I'd love to. / Yes, please.

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Sure, I'd love to! / Yes, that would be great.
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: Would you like to 〜? には I'd love to で「喜んで」と返すと自然です。

turns.partnerLine: Cheers to the happy couple!
turns.partnerLineJa: お二人に乾杯！
turns.hint: Cheers! / To the couple! / Congratulations to them!

sampleFeedback.naturalAlternative: Cheers! / To the happy couple! / Here's to them!
sampleFeedback.explanationJa: 乾杯のときは Cheers! や To 〜!（〜に乾杯）と言います。Here's to them もよく使います。
